testCaseName: N-Of query requesting 2 of 3 mutations with details action where 2 fields are selected
query: res.filter(nOf(2, nucleotideEquals(position:=1, symbol:='-'), nucleotideEquals(position:=2, symbol:='T'), nucleotideEquals(position:=27542, symbol:='N'))).details('age', 'pango_lineage').orderBy('age', 'pango_lineage')
